entities.name: SORGHUM BICOLOR
entities.description: A monocotyledonous, tropical grass model used to study hydraulic anatomy and drought response.

entities.name: HYDRAULIC ANATOMY
entities.description: The structural characteristics of the plant's water-conducting system, including xylem and phloem.

entities.name: PLANT WATER USE
entities.description: The process and amount of water utilized by the plant for growth and transpiration.

entities.name: XYLEM ANATOMY
entities.description: The structural characteristics of the xylem tissue, including area and conductivity.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of water deficiency that induces phenotypic plasticity.

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Physiological stress resulting from a lack of available water.

entities.name: GENOTYPIC SENSITIVITY TO DROUGHT
entities.description: The variation in response to drought across different genotypes.

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The loss of water vapor from the plant's aerial parts.

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics related to the physical growth and development of the plant.

entities.name: XYLEM AREA
entities.description: The cross-sectional area of the xylem tissue.

entities.name: XYLEM-SPECIFIC HYDRAULIC CONDUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of the efficiency of water transport through the xylem.

entities.name: HYDRAULIC CAPACITY
entities.description: The overall ability of the plant to transport water.

entities.name: PHLOEM ANATOMY
entities.description: The structural characteristics of the phloem tissue.

entities.name: HERBACEOUS MONOCOTS
entities.description: A group of flowering plants with one cotyledon and non-woody stems.

entities.name: GENOTYPIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity in genetic makeup among individuals of a species.

entities.name: PLASTICITY
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to produce different phenotypes in response to environmental changes.

entities.name: MODULAR PHENOTYPIC PLASTICITY
entities.description: Organ-specific phenotypic changes in response to environmental stress.

entities.name: FRACTIONS OF TRANSPIRABLE SOIL WATER
entities.description: A metric (FTSW) used to quantify available soil water.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: The controlled environment where the sorghum genotypes were studied.
